text.p: COMPLAINTS ON THE POOR STATE OF ROADS IN TOWN.
I wish to congratulate you on your recent electoral success which that elevated you to the exalted office of the Chairman of Local government Council.

Please, accept my profound and sincere congratulations for your well-deserved victory at the polls. I wish you a fruitful and purposeful tenure of office during which you shall lay a solid and formidable foundation for the rapid development of locality. Let me seize this opportunity. to reiterate once more our unalloyed support to your people oriented government. We are solidly behind you.

I wish to draw your attention to the deplorable condition of the roads to town. 1 character I need not remind you that is the foremost agricultural Community in this local government area. Therefore, town which is the food basket of this local government deserves a good network of well tarred roads. These roads will ensure that the products of the local cottage industries and the abundant farm produce get to the buyers and consumers outside town fast and cheap. This can only be achieved when new roads are constructed and the existing ones repaired or rehabilitated to make them motorable all through out the season.
I wish you 1 character a successful tenure of office.
